title: Cerberus – a local firewall for AI agents' tool calls
abstract: Cerberus – a local firewall for AI agents' tool calls is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it handles the execut...
abstract_zh: Cerberus，本地防火墙，专治AI小助手的工具狂叫！设定目标，它自动规划任务，呼叫工具，执行多步骤流程。再也不怕你的AI小助手乱发指令了，让它去忙它的，你继续手残！
